[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [filterWhitelistedModules](./x-components.filterwhitelistedmodules.md)

## filterWhitelistedModules() function

Creates a [Wire](./x-components.wire.md) that is only executed if the event is emitted from a [XModule](./x-components.xmodule.md) that is included in the `whitelist` array passed as parameter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function filterWhitelistedModules<Payload>(wire: Wire<Payload>, whitelist: Array<XModuleName | null>): Wire<Payload>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  wire | [Wire](./x-components.wire.md)<!-- -->&lt;Payload&gt; | The wire to filter using the whitelist. |
|  whitelist | Array&lt;[XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md) \| null&gt; | An array of [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md) or null. |

<b>Returns:</b>

[Wire](./x-components.wire.md)<!-- -->&lt;Payload&gt;

The Wire function with whitelisted modules filter.
